_doc_worktree_base_dir: null = sibling do repo (<parent>/<repo-name>-worktrees). Override absoluto se nao-null.
_doc_default_branch: null = detect via 'git symbolic-ref refs/remotes/origin/HEAD'. Override (ex: 'main') se nao-null.
_doc_symlinks: Paths (relativos ao repo root) que serao symlinkados do principal -> worktree no /new-session. Skip silencioso se path nao existe.
